body:
…ity unit tests

This was requested in the review of #872 

This will close #873 
I think it's expected that we see some degraded convergence rate. I think I remember Tapio mentioned this when this operator was discussed a while ago.

I added unit tests with varying sign velocity for the periodic mesh case and non-periodic mesh cases with `ThirdOrderOneSided` BC. The other one (`FirstOrderOneSided`) is already not accurate enough and also Tapio suggested we should favor using the `ThirdOrderOneSided` for this reason.
